title: HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Nagpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies:
HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies!
